  "mnemonics": [
    "CLT - Cows Love Toady,
    Numbers are Constantly Too large",
    "Confidence Limit - Clown Fish Always Negotiates"
  ],
  "keyPoints": [
    "The Central Limit Theorem states that the distribution of the mean of a large sample of independent and identically distributed random variables will be approximately normally distributed, regardless of the original variable's distribution.",
